# Simone Mattioli — Adventures in Technology & Humanity

> Personal portfolio and blog of Simone Mattioli — a Computer Science student (University of Verona; Master's at KTH Royal Institute of Technology) specializing in Artificial Intelligence, Large Language Models, and High-Performance Computing. International volunteer (Brazil), mountain and outdoor enthusiast, content creator. The site bridges technology with human-centered values.

## Key pages
- [About](https://simo-hue.github.io/about/): bio, education, vision, and passions
- [Blog](https://simo-hue.github.io/blog/): tech projects, experiences, thoughts, and book notes
- [Tech projects](https://simo-hue.github.io/blog/tech-project/): software and AI/ML projects
- [Publications](https://simo-hue.github.io/blog/publication/): research (e.g. an LLM tourism-mobility predictor)
- [Experiences](https://simo-hue.github.io/blog/experience/): travel, academic exchanges (KTH, ELTE, TalTech), and volunteering
- [Globe](https://simo-hue.github.io/globe/): an interactive map of visited places and their stories
- [Links](https://simo-hue.github.io/links/): all social and contact links

## Topics
Computer Science · Artificial Intelligence · Large Language Models · High-Performance Computing · software engineering · international volunteering · mountains and outdoor sports · personal growth.
